title: portulaca oleracea subsp. zaffranii
intro: Portulaca oleracea subsp. zaffranii, also known as the yellow purslane or zaffran purslane, is a plant species within the Portulaca oleracea complex, belonging to the family Portulacaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Portulaca oleracea subsp. zaffranii include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Portulaca oleracea subsp. zaffranii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in salads or as a cooked vegetable, although its preparation and consumption should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
